title: matricaria recutita var. pappulosa
intro: Matricaria recutita var. pappulosa, also known as the chamomile plant, is a flowering herbaceous perennial plant in the daisy family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as soothing anxiety and insomnia, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. Chamomile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being. The plant's health benefits are also attributed to its high concentration of apigenin, a flavonoid that has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
